title: 有馬記念の後に・キーワードを集めよ

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Aww yeah! Landed a big one!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Gold Ship finishes up another fantastic race!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
This is how an Umamusume of the sea lives! Now,
to wave my fishing banner and let everyone know
of my big haul!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Superb. As expected, Golshi.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Well, if it isn't Flash!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You've got a good angler's spirit yourself! You
practically heaped your own fishing boat to
capsizing!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
You honor me with your praise. By the way, do
you remember our agreement?

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Sure do. You said you'd trade me your shark fins
if I landed the legendary giant squid, yeah?

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
There seems to be a discrepancy in your memory
of the details... But, as promised, this is now
yours.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Gasp! Why, this is...

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
A hint to Eden's location, as entrusted to me by a
certain individual.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
So all I have to do to find Eden is do what this
says?!

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Apologies, but I cannot say. I am but the
messenger.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
However, if you follow the directions closely, we
shall surely meet again. Goodbye.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Heh... Now, that's interesting!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
You're curious too, huh? All right, I'll read it to
you!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: "In truth, Eden lies beneath the waves..."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"Seeking it blindly would be a nigh impossible
task. Thus, a puzzle in four parts has been
prepared to aid you."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
"Collect the clues by facing even more formidable
foes! Yours truly, the Book of Secrets."

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Challenge strong opponents to get hints and solve a puzzle, huh? Nice, now I can use my brains and brawns!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Considering what Flash said earlier, I have a
feeling I'll be racing her again soon.

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text: Oh, this is fun! Let's do this!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I still just can't get over that offhand "Yours truly,
the Book of Secrets" thing at the end.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Besides, who gave Eishin Flash that information in
the first place?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I should be more concerned about this whole
thing, but as long as Gold Ship is motivated to
race, I find myself willing to let a lot slide!
